## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` passed (or equivalent Docker-first validation)
- [ ] Preview checked for UI/search changes

## Process Update

- [ ] I updated `docs/process.md` if requirements or behavior changed
- [ ] If not updated, I confirm no requirement/behavior change happened

## Risks

- Any regression risk, migration impact, or follow-up work
